'''Sommen''' was an agent who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. As a part of an infiltration mission, Sommen worked as a medical engineer for [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]] on [[Tauber]]. He was design-station neighbor to Dr. [[Cinto Alaras]]. The Rebel Alliance [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]] feared that Alaras was trying to steal Sommen's work and would soon reveal his cover.<ref name="AIR" />
